description: Product Description Coloch 10 Pack Spanish Floral Folding Hand Fan with Plastic Side The folding hand fan is made of premium material and plastic staves, lightweight and long-lived. The hand fan is easy to fold and unfold, easy to hold in hand without effort. You will be surprised by its excellent performance. Compact Size Cute Handheld Fan Coloch set of 10 Spanish floral folding hand fan measures 9 inches/23cm long and 16 inches/42cm wide when unfolded. Key Features Set of 10 Lightweight Easy to Hold Delicate Pattern Easy to Carry When folded, the fan is just 2.3cm thick, convenient for carrying. Carved Staves The plastic staves are carved and dotted with golden decorative patterns. Set of 10 The sufficient quantity of 10 can meet your needs of daily use and replacement. Different Flower Patterns The 10 fans are printed with several different flower patterns, well matched with different dresses. Please note that there may be two or three repeating fans out of ten. Nice Decoration Choice The exquisite handheld fan serves as nice decorations for your wall, table, and so on. Nice Decoration Choice The vintage fan set can be used for parties, cosplay, performance, or other occasions.
